mapper.sql: lable_code AS lableCode, lable_name AS lableName, parent_code AS parentCode, parent_codes AS parentCodes, tree_sort AS treeSort, tree_sorts AS treeSorts, tree_leaf AS treeLeaf, tree_level AS treeLevel, tree_names AS treeNames, status, create_date AS createDate, update_date AS updateDate, lable_id AS lableId, lable_details_id AS lableDetailsId, rebates, user_b_id AS userBId, show, reson, state
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CAST(lable_code as SIGNED INTEGER)) lableCode FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE parent_code = 0

SELECT lable_code lableCode, lable_name lableName, parent_code parentCode, parent_codes parentCodes, tree_sort treeSort, tree_sorts treeSorts, tree_leaf treeLeaf, tree_level treeLevel, tree_names treeNames, status status, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate, lable_id lableId, lable_details_id lableDetailsId, rebates, user_b_id userBId, reson reson, state state FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE parent_code = #{lableCode}
SELECT lable_details_id id,lable_name content,rebates FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{user_b_id} AND lable_id = #{id} AND `show` = 0
SELECT * FROM app_lable_details_review_tree WHERE user_b_id =#{userBId} AND lable_id =#{id} AND tree_level =1
